历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 1246 → 1145 → 2420 → 2139 → 5529. It stabilized around 1200 in 2021–2022, dropped significantly to 2420 in 2023, slightly recovered to 2139 in 2024, and due to an abnormal classification-based admission group (005) in 2025, it dropped sharply to 5529, with a cumulative decline of about 4300 places over the past 3 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 5529. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Jilin Province was 51 students in 2021–2022, 48 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 52 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 49 students, a reduction of about 5.8% compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and may lead to a modest forward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 8th from 2021 to 2024 and about 9th in 2025–2026, firmly in the national Top 10, belonging to the top-tier university level. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is generally positive, mainly involving the canteen ranking first nationally and good admissions transparency. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 22nd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased application attention. No obvious admission gaps or breaks have been recorded. It has 4 A+ disciplines (Mechanical Engineering, Optical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering), 4 A disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Physics, Computer Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering), and 7 A- disciplines (Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Chemistry, Basic Medicine, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Biology), totaling 17 disciplines at A- or above, indicating extremely strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's advantageous disciplines. Civil Engineering, Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province general college entrance examination is approximately 110,868, basically unchanged from 2025 (111,492). Based on recent proportions, the Physics Category is estimated to have about 80,000 candidates, with a stable competitive environment. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is very small (about 0.5%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no obvious regional preference advantage. However, as a top national engineering university, it still has strong appeal to candidates from Northeast China.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal backward shift in ranking in 2025 (5529), the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (52→49, about -5.8%), the positive reputation, and the increased Douyin popularity: the enrollment reduction provides momentum for a forward shift in ranking, while the positive reputation and Douyin popularity reflect rising application interest, also pushing the ranking forward. However, the abnormal backward shift in 2025 is partly due to adjustments in the major group structure. It is expected that the 2026 ranking will shift slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5288, with a range of 4788–5788.

- Pediatrics (5-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4788–5788, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Automation, Optoelectronics, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine 8-year, Turing Class, Future Technology Experimental Class) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Clinical Medicine 5-year, Pharmacy, Preventive Medicine) as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<4788), one can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (Liberal Arts) was approximately 595→487→431→464→754. From 2021 to 2024, the overall ranking moved forward (from 595th to 464th), but in 2025 it significantly moved backward to 754th, with a cumulative backward shift of about 290 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 754th. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province was 2 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 4 in 2024, and decreased to 3 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 4 students, an increase of approximately 33.3% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, easing competition and putting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 9th on the Soft Science main list, a top 10 national elite university. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive. Douyin popularity ranking is 22nd (relatively hot), with overall high attention. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is known for engineering and medicine, but its History Category enrollment majors are only Business Administration (rated A-) and Public Affairs Management (Public Management not separately rated), with relatively limited advantages in liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Business Administration/Business Management has a clear social trend of discouragement, while Public Affairs Management has average popularity and is wait-and-see. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province general college entrance examination is approximately 110,868, with an estimated 30,800 in the History Category based on recent proportions, indicating a stable competitive environment. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and enrolls very few students (3–4) in the History Category in Jilin Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward shift in 2025 ranking (754th), the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (3→4 students, approximately +33.3%), the relatively positive reputation but limited appeal of liberal arts majors: the expansion puts downward pressure on rankings, while the positive reputation provides some offset, but the History Category has few majors with average popularity. It is expected that the ranking will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 905th, with a range of 802–1008th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 802–1008, the History Category only has two majors: Business Administration and Public Affairs Management. It is recommended to target Business Administration as the primary choice and use Public Affairs Management as a safety option. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<802), you can safely choose Business Administration.
